PostCSS is a tool for transforming styles with JS plugins.
These plugins can lint your CSS, supportГ‚В variablesГ‚В andГ‚В mixins,
transpileГ‚В futureГ‚В CSSГ‚В syntax, inlineГ‚В images, andГ‚В more.

PostCSS is used by industry leaders including Wikipedia, Twitter, Alibaba,
